titleStmt.title: Letter from S. C. (Sophy) McLaughlin to Augusta (Lady Clonbrock), 22 July 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Sophy McLaughlin

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: The letter was sent by a cousin, Sophy McLaughlin, to congratulate Augusta Lady Clonbrock and her husband, Luke Gerald Dillon, 4th Baron Clonbrock, on their golden wedding anniversary. The writer also refers to Emily Lady Lonsdale, whom she fears 'is failing' and her memory getting worse.

msIdentifier.collection: Clonbrock Estate Papers, Collection List No 54; Ms 35,793 (9)

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Glenore
West Moors LIKOMA
MALVERIL WELLS July 22. My dear Augusta In todays papers I see you are
celebrating your Golden Wedding & I am writing
to wish you much happiness. I wonder if you
have heard anything of Emily Lonsadale. I can't
help fearing that she is failing. Her memory seemed
to me not so good & Mrs Carl Cather was finished
by Lorena Churchill. Next week Ian & I are going to
Praise Light at. Christchurch. Yours affec etc cousin S. C. McLaughlin. P.S. Ian & Georgia are with me at Malveri
Wells.
10 Cadogan Gardens
Chelsea
London
SW The
Lady Clonbrock
Clonbrock
Athlone.
Ahascaragh
Ireland. Sophy McLaughlin
